name: Instant Spitfire
description: Instant Spitfire is the digital counterpart of Spitfire in Skylanders: SuperChargers. Unlike the other Instant Skylanders, he can be played on multiple platforms.
biography: Instant Spitfire is the digital counterpart of Spitfire in Skylanders: SuperChargers. He is unlocked by unplugging the SuperChargers Portal and plugging in any of the Portals of Power from previous games. By pressing X (PlayStation 3/PlayStation 4) or A (Xbox 360/Xbox One/Wii U), he and Instant Hot Streak become playable. However, he's significantly weaker than regular Spitfire, and this Skylander is incompatible with Co-Op mode as he requires an empty portal to be active. His English voice actor is Diedrich Bader.
personality: Spitfire is a fiery and energetic Flame Spirit who lived to race. He is incredibly fast, both in his movements and his thinking, and possesses a competitive spirit that drives him to be the best. Despite his intensity, he is a loyal Skylander dedicated to stopping Kaos.

story.content: Instant Spitfire is the digital counterpart of Spitfire in Skylanders: SuperChargers. Unlike the other Instant Skylanders, he can be played on multiple platforms. He is unlocked by unplugging the SuperChargers Portal and plugging in any of the Portals of Power from previous games. By pressing X (PlayStation 3/PlayStation 4) or A (Xbox 360/Xbox One/Wii U), he and Instant Hot Streak become playable. However, he's significantly weaker than regular Spitfire, and this Skylander is incompatible with Co-Op mode as he requires an empty portal to be active.

trivia: He is the only instant Skylander of the Fire element. The other two elements (Water and Life) each have two instant Skylanders.
He is the only digital exclusive Skylander to be playable in the consoles.
He's significantly weaker than regular Spitfire.

trailers.name: Skylanders Superchargers - How to unlock INSTANT SPITFIRE & INSTANT HOT STREAK - SECRET VARIANTS

gameplay: Instant Spitfire shares the same move set as the standard Spitfire, utilizing fast-paced claw swipes and fiery dashes. He is significantly weaker than regular Spitfire, and this Skylander is incompatible with Co-Op mode as he requires an empty portal to be active.

basic.name: Flash Fire
basic.content: Dash forward in a burst of flame, damaging anything in your way.

basic_upgrades.name: Flamenado
basic_upgrades.content: Hold the secondary attack button to create a fire tornado.

basic_upgrades.name: Flamenado 2
basic_upgrades.content: An improved version of the Flamenado attack.

soulgems.name: Mega Marathon
soulgems.content: Flamenado lasts much longer and covers more ground.

abilities.name: Hyper Burner
abilities.content: Dashing deals more damage and leaves a trail of fire.
